op.text: Cleared by physical therapy for light jogging as of 2025-05-24; running twenty minutes on flat ground every other day. First run 2025-05-24 morning along esplanade. Still attending physical therapy.

Sam built out spare room for remote work setup (three monitors, foam panels); starts Austin robotics job in approximately two weeks from 2025-05-24 (early June 2025). Described as 'nervous-excited' about start.

Has made peace with not running Lakefront Marathon October 2025; sees no responsible training path from twenty-minute jogs in late May to 26.2 miles in October. Open to signing up again next year. Current goal: run pain-free by fall without re-injury. Described learning 'something about not white-knuckling timelines' from the ankle injury experience.
